name: facebook-ads-mcp-server
description: A Python MCP server for Facebook Ads API integration
long_description: This extension provides comprehensive Facebook Ads management capabilities through a Python MCP server. It enables programmatic access to Facebook Ads data and management features, including account management, campaign insights, ad set operations, and performance analytics through the Facebook Graph API.

tools.name: list_ad_accounts
tools.description: Lists ad accounts linked to the Facebook access token

tools.name: get_details_of_ad_account
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific ad account

tools.name: get_adaccount_insights
tools.description: Retrieves performance insights for an ad account

tools.name: get_campaign_insights
tools.description: Retrieves performance insights for a campaign

tools.name: get_adset_insights
tools.description: Retrieves performance insights for an ad set

tools.name: get_ad_insights
tools.description: Retrieves performance insights for an ad

tools.name: fetch_pagination_url
tools.description: Fetches data from a pagination URL

tools.name: get_ad_creative_by_id
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific ad creative

tools.name: get_ad_creatives_by_ad_id
tools.description: Retrieves creatives associated with an ad

tools.name: get_ad_by_id
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific ad

tools.name: get_ads_by_adaccount
tools.description: Retrieves ads within an ad account

tools.name: get_ads_by_campaign
tools.description: Retrieves ads within a campaign

tools.name: get_ads_by_adset
tools.description: Retrieves ads within an ad set

tools.name: get_adset_by_id
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific ad set

tools.name: get_adsets_by_ids
tools.description: Retrieves details for multiple ad sets by their IDs

tools.name: get_adsets_by_adaccount
tools.description: Retrieves ad sets within an ad account

tools.name: get_adsets_by_campaign
tools.description: Retrieves ad sets within a campaign

tools.name: get_campaign_by_id
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific campaign

tools.name: get_campaigns_by_adaccount
tools.description: Retrieves campaigns within an ad account

tools.name: get_activities_by_adaccount
tools.description: Retrieves change history for an ad account

tools.name: get_activities_by_adset
tools.description: Retrieves change history for an ad set

tools.name: create_campaign
tools.description: Creates a new Facebook ad campaign. Supports all objectives, CBO budgets, buying_type (AUCTION/RESERVED), spend_cap, and Advantage+ smart_promotion_type. Use status='PAUSED' to save as draft.

tools.name: update_campaign
tools.description: Updates an existing campaign: name, status, daily/lifetime budget, spend_cap, start/stop time, bid strategy

tools.name: create_adset
tools.description: Creates a new ad set. Full param support: targeting, optimization, budget, destination_type, promoted_object (pixel/app/page for conversion campaigns), pacing_type, is_dynamic_creative, frequency_control_specs, attribution_spec, DSA compliance fields, Advantage+ fields

tools.name: update_adset
tools.description: Updates an existing ad set. Supports all create_adset fields: name, status, budget, bidding, optimization, targeting, destination_type, promoted_object, pacing, frequency caps, attribution windows, DSA fields

tools.name: create_ad_creative
tools.description: Creates a new ad creative. Supports single-asset (object_story_spec), multi-asset DCO (asset_feed_spec), Advantage+ Creative (degrees_of_freedom_spec), url_tags, and call_to_action_type. Creatives are immutable after creation.

tools.name: create_ad
tools.description: Creates a new ad by linking an ad creative to an ad set. Supports tracking_specs (pixel) and audience_id for ad-level targeting.

tools.name: update_ad
tools.description: Updates an existing ad: name, status, creative swap (creative_id), or tracking_specs

tools.name: copy_campaign
tools.description: Duplicate a campaign into an ad account (optionally deep copy with all child ad sets and ads)

tools.name: copy_adset
tools.description: Duplicate an ad set into a campaign

tools.name: copy_ad
tools.description: Duplicate an ad into an ad set

tools.name: get_audiences
tools.description: List all custom audiences in an ad account

tools.name: create_custom_audience
tools.description: Create a custom audience (CUSTOM, WEBSITE, APP, or ENGAGEMENT subtype)

tools.name: upload_custom_audience_users
tools.description: Upload hashed email/phone list to a CUSTOM audience

tools.name: create_lookalike_audience
tools.description: Create a Lookalike Audience from a source custom audience

tools.name: get_reach_estimate
tools.description: Estimate potential reach for a targeting spec before creating an ad set

tools.name: delete_audience
tools.description: Permanently delete a custom audience

tools.name: get_insights_with_breakdown
tools.description: Get ad insights broken down by age, gender, placement, device, country, etc.

tools.name: upload_ad_image
tools.description: Upload a local image file to an ad account for use in creatives

tools.name: upload_ad_video
tools.description: Upload a local video file and wait for encoding to complete

tools.name: get_video_upload_status
tools.description: Check encoding status of an uploaded video

tools.name: get_ad_previews
tools.description: Get rendered HTML preview iframes for an ad across placements

tools.name: get_product_catalogs
tools.description: List all product catalogs in a Business Manager

tools.name: create_product_catalog
tools.description: Create a new product catalog (commerce, vehicles, real_estate, etc.)

tools.name: get_product_sets
tools.description: List product sets in a catalog

tools.name: create_product_set
tools.description: Create a filtered product set within a catalog for Dynamic Ads

tools.name: get_products
tools.description: List products in a catalog with optional RSQL filtering

tools.name: create_product
tools.description: Add a single product item to a catalog

tools.name: update_product
tools.description: Update fields on an existing product (price, availability, url, etc.)

tools.name: delete_product
tools.description: Delete a product from a catalog

tools.name: batch_upload_products
tools.description: Batch CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE multiple catalog products in one API call

tools.name: search_targeting_interests
tools.description: Search interest-based targeting options by keyword

tools.name: search_geo_locations
tools.description: Search geographic targeting locations by name (country, region, city)

tools.name: search_targeting_behaviors
tools.description: Search behavior-based targeting options (purchase patterns, device usage, travel)

tools.name: search_targeting_demographics
tools.description: Search demographic targeting options (education, job title, life events)

tools.name: browse_targeting_categories
tools.description: Browse all available targeting categories without a search query

tools.name: create_advantage_plus_shopping_campaign
tools.description: Create a fully AI-automated Advantage+ Shopping Campaign (ASC)

tools.name: create_adset_with_advantage_audience
tools.description: Create an ad set with Advantage+ Audience enabled (Meta AI expands targeting)

tools.name: enable_advantage_creative
tools.description: Enable Advantage+ Creative enhancements on an existing ad

tools.name: get_performance_recommendations
tools.description: Get Meta AI-generated performance recommendations for an ad account

tools.name: get_page_posts
tools.description: List recent published posts from a Facebook Page. Returns post IDs ready to use as object_story_id in ad creatives. Requires a Page Access Token — provide page_access_token param if auto-fetch fails.

facebook_access_token.title: Facebook Access Token
facebook_access_token.description: Facebook User Access Token with necessary permissions (e.g., ads_read)
